summary: Iteration 96 - Sprint Features Testing completed. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed: 1) Go Live toggle UI in SurferSessionHub matches On-Demand layout with toggle switch, settings arrow, and spot selector, 2) Auth redirect preserves original path (/bookings -> ?redirect=%2Fbookings), 3) New extracted components (BookingCard, PriceCalculator, GalleryGrid) exist and export correctly, 4) POST /api/photographer/{id}/end-session endpoint working.
critical_code_review_comments: Go Live toggle UI VERIFIED: SurferSessionHub.js lines 239-350 - toggle with data-testid='go-live-toggle', disabled until spot selected (line 286), settings arrow present (lines 260-271)
Auth redirect VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute in App.js (lines 90-93) preserves path via ?redirect= parameter
BookingCard.js VERIFIED: Exports BookingCard component with data-testid='booking-card-{id}'
PriceCalculator.js VERIFIED: Exports usePriceCalculator hook and PriceBreakdown component
GalleryGrid.js VERIFIED: Exports GalleryGridItem and GalleryGrid components with data-testid='gallery-item-{id}'
POST /api/photographer/{id}/end-session VERIFIED: Returns 400 when no active session, 404 for invalid photographer
Note: SurferSessionHub Go Live toggle is for Hobbyist/Grom Parent roles. Photographer/Approved Pro roles use BlueLiveIcon instead
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint features verified: 1) Go Live toggle in SurferSessionHub mirrors On-Demand exactly (toggle switch, settings arrow, spot selector, disabled until spot selected), 2) Auth redirect preserves path via ProtectedRoute, 3) Three new extracted components working (BookingCard, PriceCalculator, GalleryGrid), 4) End-session endpoint working. Note: Photographer/Approved Pro roles use BlueLiveIcon for live sessions, not SurferSessionHub.
